title: Site navigation, discovery, and themes
summary: A site-focused patch with better navigation, search, game discovery, social tools, profiles, themes, and extension access recovery.
changelog: Reworked the site navigation with a responsive layout, a single account menu, configurable link order, and cleaner UGC Labs integration.
Added fuzzy player and game search with keyboard focus using /, richer results, and account role indicators.
Added home-page game discovery with continue playing, trending games, sorting controls, player counts, and direct Play in Browser actions.
Added a social side panel with friends, incoming requests, sent requests, and request actions without leaving the page.
Improved profile, social, settings, and game-page layouts across normal and high-resolution displays.
Expanded site theme controls and presets, including Dark Clear, Light Clear, Roblox 2007, and Metro starting points.
Improved custom profile background and nameplate readability by adapting text and controls to the media behind them.
Fixed free access recovery after extension reloads or updates, along with several signed-out routing and session-state issues.
